_doc: Map of route to allowed Axe rule IDs. Allowed pairs are exempt from the serious/critical gate. Add an entry only with a justification in PR review.

_followups.color-contrast: Light-theme --faint token (#a09cbc on #f4f2ff = 2.38:1) used by tag chips and meta text. Tracked as design follow-up; bump --faint to a 4.5:1-compliant token in a dedicated PR.
